note: Reindex IS the host for the cosine half of reorg; 019 TTL is a relationship not a constant. Resolves #12 needs-verify.

claim: NET-NEW (H/M): add a cosine-reconsolidation sweep as a 4th runIndexScan phase over successfullyIndexedFiles. 018's responsive scan ALREADY supplies every primitive Initiative B cadence-reorg needs (cancellation memory-index.ts:976-980, 200-row macrotask-yield :1136-1148, embedding-drain, ref-counted marker :1440-1484); reconsolidate() (embed->K-NN->determineAction >=0.88 MERGE/[0.75,0.88)supersede/<0.75 store, reconsolidation.ts:202) is the per-doc unit. syn06:117 calls cadence-reorg 'a shape we dont have' — unaware 018 shipped it.

EXTENDS 027 doctrine (H/S): host only the LLM-free embedding reconsolidation (merge/supersede) inside reindex behind a shadow flag; keep LT-bg-sleeptime-agent + LT-llm-transcript-chunking as a separate governed packet. Reorg MUTATES (breaks scan re-run-is-safe idempotency memory-index.ts:962-966); LLM half has no governor.

EXTENDS (L/S) resolves reconciliation needs-verify: syn06 #12 CG-content-hash-reprocessing-trigger — scan re-derives embeddings/edges on changed content (force/updated/reinforced re-embed memory-index.ts:1039-1059) but does NOT do merge/supersede reorg (separate gated path needs pre-reconsolidation checkpoint reconsolidation-bridge.ts:514-527). Verdict: #12 HALF-covered.

NET-NEW (M/S) the 019 TTL gap: replace hardcoded MAINTENANCE_MARKER_TTL_MS=180000 (justified only vs an observed ~79s phase, maintenance-marker.ts:23-25) with ownerLease.ttlMs x K, K>2. Timescales: lease TTL=60s, heartbeat=30s, stale-reclaim=2xTTL=120s (launcher.cjs:420,457,526); marker=180s. Both timers .unref() starve under a blocking phase -> busy daemon loses heartbeat AND marker together; marker is the only thing stopping shouldAdoptDespiteProbe from reaping a live daemon. The 180s>120s ordering (60s margin) is the real invariant, implicit.

EXTENDS 018 (M/S): codify 'every synchronous phase longer than TTL/2 must call maintenance.refresh()'. 018's 200-row yield + phase-boundary refresh keep non-yielding spans under the refresh window; a wedged daemon cant refresh -> marker lapses TTL-after-last-refresh -> zombie reap-latency ceiling = one TTL. Residual risk: a future sync phase without a yield/refresh hook exceeds 180s -> false reap.
